review_title: Outstanding Centralized Infrastructure Management Solution suitable for networks of any scale
description: Everest IMS is an outstanding infrastructure management solution that helps in managing networks of any scale centrally. With wide range of features and customized dashboards, it's very impressive in terms of performance and presenting vibrant dashboards & reports. A must consideration while evaluating network monitoring tools.
author: Ramesh K.
pros: It works with all kind of Network and Satellite communication equipment be it Serial port based or Ethernet Port based. Host of features and customization by Everest IMS Team offers top-notch user experience to Customers and NOC Team. Being a "Made in India" tool and having their R&D center in Bangalore, very reliable support mechanism is in place. This tool can cater monitoring requirements of almost any Industry.
cons: Bundled solution consisting of Hardware, Software & Support services of the Everest IMS solution would make it more dependable.

author: Raju K.
pros: Easy to use dashboard,Intuitive buttons/links,good overall design
cons: Need of implementation services from Infraon was quite bad,it should be optional and customers should be allowed to perform the installation.

description: This tool is very useful as per our project. easy to use, easy to learn, easy to describe to another person. showing everything which you want.
author: Praveen K.
pros: Easy to use, Device Availability report is very helpful to know the device availability or showing CPU utilization & Memory Utilization which has very useful.
cons: There was one error which we are seen. When we discovered the Site in this tool, we have seen that node is showing under maintenance. but site was working. that point is showing some disadvantage of this tool another tool has superb.

description: It help me a lot, as i do not have to sit in the chair and look after all devices and server for their healt,
author: Suresh T.
pros: Alert, Email and SMS notification, are the most i like.
cons: Dashboard creating can be made easy or can have more template as it make easy for novice user.

description: Good for network monitoring and log management.
